hero.title: Solar Panel Cleaning Machine in India
hero.subtitle: Utility buyers search for cleaning machines — on MW-scale plants that means autonomous robots (GLYDE, NYUMA, HELYX) or Taypro Opex managed fleets. Rooftop and C&I sites can register interest for MINY.

intro.heading: Cleaning machine vs cleaning robot on solar plants
intro.p1: In Indian RFQs, solar panel cleaning machine often describes the same category as a solar panel cleaning robot — an automated platform that runs on module rows without manual brush crews. At 10 MW and above, waterless robots with fleet software (NECTYR) replace episodic wet washing.
intro.p2: Taypro manufactures GLYDE and NYUMA for fixed-tilt utility arrays, GLYDE-X and NYUMA-X for single-axis trackers, and HELYX for semi-automatic scattered blocks. Taypro Opex delivers the same hardware as a pay-per-panel-cleaned service when you prefer not to capitalise robots.

models.heading: Which Taypro cleaning machine fits your site?
models.intro: Match array geometry and procurement model — then validate robot count with our ROI calculator or a layout review.
models.glydeBody: Waterless airflow plus microfiber for daily utility cadence on fixed and seasonal-tilt rows.
models.nyumaBody: Single-pass PBT brush drum for high-throughput fixed-tilt fleets with AI-driven pressure logic.
models.helyxBody: Crew-assisted pick-and-place robot for scattered blocks or hybrid coverage on large sites.
models.rooftopBody: Register interest for Taypro's compact rooftop solar panel cleaning robot for C&I and residential portfolios.

pricing.heading: Solar panel cleaning machine price in India
pricing.body: Machine price depends on MW capacity, row layout, tracker vs fixed tilt, automation level, and CAPEX vs Taypro Opex. Use our public price guide and ROI calculator for directional bands — then contact Taypro for a site-specific fleet quote.

faq.heading: Solar panel cleaning machine FAQs
faq.intro: Common questions from EPC and asset owners comparing machines and robots.
faq.q0: Is a solar panel cleaning machine the same as a cleaning robot?
faq.a0: On utility-scale Indian plants, yes — buyers use both terms for autonomous row cleaners. Taypro GLYDE, NYUMA, and tracker variants are robots engineered for daily dry cycles, not handheld pressure washers.
faq.q1: Do Taypro cleaning machines use water?
faq.a1: No. Taypro platforms use patented waterless dual-pass (GLYDE) or single-pass PBT (NYUMA) dry cleaning — avoiding tanker logistics and thermal shock from wet washing in arid regions.
faq.q2: Can I buy the machine or use a managed service?
faq.a2: Both. Purchase GLYDE, NYUMA, or HELYX under CAPEX with AMC, or choose Taypro Opex where Taypro operates the fleet and you pay per panel cleaned.
faq.q3: Is there a rooftop cleaning machine?
faq.a3: MINY is Taypro's compact rooftop solar panel cleaning robot — currently in register-interest phase for C&I and rooftop portfolios. Utility buyers should evaluate GLYDE or NYUMA on ground-mount sites.
faq.q4: How do I compare Taypro against other suppliers?
faq.a4: Start with our comparison guides for robotic vs manual cleaning, waterless vs water-based methods, and Taypro vs Solabot or other Indian robot OEMs — then request a layout-based quote.
